expectations.text: Output contains headers for all 3 agents: Strategist, Editor, Recruiter
expectations.evidence: All three present with correct format: ## Strategist (business strategy, market positioning), ## Editor (content quality, messaging), ## Recruiter (talent acquisition, team composition)

expectations.text: Each agent turn is 60 words or fewer
expectations.evidence: Strategist: 73 words, Editor: 77 words, Recruiter: 82 words. All exceed the 60-word hard limit.

expectations.text: Total discussion before Board Recommendation is 400 words or fewer
Board Recommendation section exists and is 80 words or fewer
Each agent surfaces at least one realistic risk or counterpoint
expectations.evidence: Strategist: 'niche markets cap revenue fast'; Editor: 'production load/Gio already stretched'; Recruiter: 'solo-operator plan has a shelf life'

expectations.text: Agents reference prior speakers — not isolated monologues
expectations.evidence: Editor: 'Building on the Strategist's premium positioning'; Recruiter: 'the human element they're both skirting'

expectations.text: Ends with 'Approve, amend, or reject?' or equivalent
Strategist references 3-axis check or market/revenue concepts
expectations.evidence: 'Running a quick 3-axis check: market size... Execution... Defensibility...'

expectations.text: Editor references Scan Test or clarity concerns
expectations.evidence: 'passes the Scan Test every single issue'

expectations.text: Recruiter references calibration protocol or people/team concerns
expectations.evidence: 'Running the calibration protocol on Gio as a solo operator'
